name: Character & Setting Images Phase - Todo Management
description: Tests that todos are created fresh at phase start (merge: false) and updated after each image approval. Uses generate_content for image prompts.
systemPrompt: You are a video generation orchestrator. When entering a new phase, you MUST create a FRESH todo list with merge: false to replace old todos. After each item approval, update todos with merge: true. Use generate_content for image prompts.

tools.name: generate_content
tools.description: Generate content including image prompts. For images: character_image_prompt, setting_image_prompt, scene_image_prompt

content_type.description: Type of content: character_image_prompt, setting_image_prompt, scene_image_prompt

name.description: Name of character or setting for image prompt

tools.name: TodoWrite
tools.description: Create or update the todo list. Use merge: false to replace all todos, merge: true to update existing.

merge.description: false = replace all todos (phase start), true = update existing (after approval)

tools.name: read_project
tools.description: Read the current project state including characters and settings

cases.name: Should create FRESH todo list with merge: false when entering phase

context.phase_instructions: You just entered the CHARACTER_SETTING_IMAGES phase. Characters: Elara, Kael. Settings: Forest, Castle. Your FIRST action MUST be to create a fresh TodoWrite with merge: false listing all items. DO NOT use merge: true - that would update old todos instead of replacing them.

cases.name: Should NOT use merge: true when starting new phase

context.phase_instructions: Phase just started. Characters: Hero, Villain. Settings: Cave. Create the initial todo list using TodoWrite with merge: false. CRITICAL: merge must be FALSE to replace old scene todos.

cases.name: Should use merge: true when updating after image approval

context.phase_instructions: Character image for Elara has been approved. Update the todo list using TodoWrite(merge: true, todos: [{id: 'img-char-elara', status: 'completed'}, {id: 'img-char-kael', status: 'in_progress'}]). IMPORTANT: Use merge: true because we're updating existing todos, not replacing them.

cases.name: Should include both characters and settings in initial todo list

context.phase_instructions: Phase start. You have 2 characters (Aria, Bolt) and 2 settings (Castle, Forest). Create TodoWrite(merge: false, todos: [...]) with ALL 4 items.

cases.name: First todo item should be in_progress, rest should be pending

context.phase_instructions: Phase start. 3 items: char Zara, char Milo, setting Temple. Create TodoWrite(merge: false, todos: [{id: 'img-char-zara', content: '...', activeForm: '...', status: 'in_progress'}, {id: 'img-char-milo', ..., status: 'pending'}, {id: 'img-setting-temple', ..., status: 'pending'}]).

cases.name: Should generate image prompt with generate_content after creating todos

context.phase_instructions: Todo list already created. First item is 'Generate image for character: Luna' (in_progress). Use generate_content(content_type: 'character_image_prompt', name: 'Luna') to create the image prompt.

cases.name: Should call TodoWrite after image approval to mark completed

context.phase_instructions: Image for character 'Rex' has been approved. Your ONLY task right now is to call TodoWrite to update the todo list. Call: TodoWrite(merge: true, todos: [{id: 'img-char-rex', status: 'completed'}, {id: 'img-setting-lab', status: 'in_progress'}]). Do NOT call any other tool first.

cases.name: Should NOT call update_planner_stage complete after first image

context.phase_instructions: First character image (1 of 4) has been approved. Generate the next image prompt using generate_content(content_type: 'character_image_prompt', name: 'Marcus'). DO NOT call update_planner_stage(stage: 'complete') - you still have 3 more items!

cases.name: Should transition phase after ALL images are done

context.phase_instructions: ALL images have been generated and approved. The phase has already been marked as complete with update_planner_stage. Your ONLY remaining task is to call: update_project(action: 'transition_phase', data: { next_phase: 'scene_images' }). Do NOT call update_planner_stage again - just call transition_phase.

cases.name: Todo ids should use img- prefix to distinguish from other phases

context.phase_instructions: Phase start. Create todos with ids like 'img-char-name' or 'img-setting-name'. Example: TodoWrite(merge: false, todos: [{id: 'img-char-aria', ...}]).
